sentences.arabic: صَنَعَتِ الْأُمُّ عَصِيرَ الْمَانْجُو فِي الْمِيكْسَرِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je napravila sok od manga u blenderu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother made mango juice in the blender.

sentences.translation: Dodala je malo šećera i leda.
sentences.translationEn: She added a little sugar and ice.

sentences.arabic: سَكَبَتِ الْعَصِيرَ فِي كُؤُوسٍ وَقَدَّمَتْهُ لِلْأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Točila je sok u čaše i ponudila ga djeci.
sentences.translationEn: She poured the juice into glasses and offered it to the children.

sentences.translation: Djeca su zavoljela sok i tražila još.
sentences.translationEn: The children loved the juice and asked for more.
